# Ramotion Theme v0.4.1

## Highlights

- Fixed child table dropdown clipping in Desk forms so link and autocomplete menus are no longer cut off by Ramotion grid containers.
- Refined child table presentation to appear as one connected table with cleaner header and body separation.
- Updated grid header typography for RTL desks so Arabic Pro fonts apply correctly and header labels sit visually centered.

## Upgrade notes

- Run `bench --site <site> migrate` after pulling the release.
- Run `bench --site <site> clear-cache` so the latest Ramotion CSS loads immediately.
- If you deploy from source, run `bench build --app ramotion_theme` to regenerate bundled assets.
